S1-FM-01: visible check step after each attempt
model answer cue or success criterion for comparison
slower pace so checking happens before the next attempt
S1-FM-02: one correction attempt as the expected next move after an error
brief error recovery routines with immediate restart
reinforcement of revised attempts not only first-try success
S1-FM-03: one or two task-matched routine choices
modeling of why one routine fits the task better
routine name paired with task type repeatedly
